description_long: This is a large, cylindrical black barrel with a flat top and bottom, featuring two metallic-looking reinforcement bands encircling its body. Prominently displayed on one side is a yellow and white warning label with a radiation symbol and the word 'RADIOACTIVE', indicating hazardous contents. Bright green, glowing liquid appears to be leaking from the top and running down the side, suggesting a breach or spill. The top of the barrel has a circular cap or bung, also highlighted with green coloration, likely for filling or emptying the contents. The surface of the barrel is matte and slightly rough, with visible wear and some irregularities. This object is typically found in industrial or hazardous waste storage settings, and its design prioritizes containment and warning of dangerous materials.
description: A large black barrel with metallic bands, a radioactive warning label, and green glowing liquid leaking from the top. The barrel has a matte, slightly rough surface and a cap on the lid.
description_view_0: Front view showing the radioactive warning label and green liquid streaking down the side.
description_view_1: Side view with the cap visible on the top, no label or leak visible.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain black surface with metallic bands, no label or leak visible.
description_view_3: Angled view showing part of the warning label and the green cap on the lid.
attribute_banding_or_reinforcement: metal hoops at top and bottom
attribute_labeling_or_markings: radioactive warning label with symbol and text
